posts.content:
Assalam o Alaikum everyone ❤️

Main ab bilkul tang aa chuki hoon in Muslim ladkon se jo baat baat mein nunni ki baat shuru kar dete hain. Jab koi Muslim ladki Hindu ladke ke saath dikhti hai toh bhagwa love trap ka rona rote hain jaise unki duniya hi toot gayi ho. Aise toxic logon ko social media se door kar dena chahiye. Block karo inko warna feed kharab ho jaata hai. No more nunni depression threads please! 🙄💅

Assalam o Alaikum everyone ❤️

Today I am completely free in the hostel. I was thinking many people have questions in their mind but no one to ask. So I am using my biology knowledge to answer honestly. If anyone has any question about life, studies, relationships or anything, you can ask me. No judgment today, just open talk!
